subject: Cubone, a small creature wearing a skull on its head, sitting alone on rocky sandy terrain
description: A small, squat creature wearing a white skull as a helmet sits on dry rocky ground. The skull obscures the creature's face entirely. The body is brownish-tan, small and rounded. The setting is sparse and arid — rocky terrain with minimal color. The overall composition is solitary and quietly melancholic, the creature appearing small against the barren landscape.
foreground: small creature in skull helmet on rocky ground
